en_title: Hell Let Loose: Vietnam Has Been Delayed Until August
subtitle: 延期打磨，品质优先
opus_summary: Team 17与Expression Games宣布，50v50硬核多人射击游戏《地狱已满：越南》发售日从原定的6月18日推迟至8月13日。开发团队在封闭及公开测试后，结合内部测试反馈，认为需要更多时间打磨PC和主机版本，以确保首发质量达到预期水准。官方表示，延期是为了让游戏以玩家应得的品质面世。

paragraphs.en: Team 17 and Expression Games have announced that the launch of Hell Let Loose: Vietnam will be delayed until August 13. The game had been planned to launch digitally on June 18.
paragraphs.cn: Team 17与Expression Games宣布，《地狱已满：越南》的发售日将推迟至8月13日。该游戏原计划于6月18日以数字版形式推出。

paragraphs.en: The decision comes following Closed and Open Beta programs for the 50v50 multiplayer shooter.
paragraphs.cn: 这一决定是在这款50v50多人射击游戏完成封闭测试和公开测试后做出的。

paragraphs.en: “In addition to your feedback, we have also been carrying out intensive internal playtests for both the PC and console versions of Hell Let Loose: Vietnam and we have identified several areas where additional development time will allow us to deliver a stronger launch experience,” the companies explained in a joint statement.
paragraphs.cn: 「除了你们的反馈，我们还对《地狱已满：越南》的PC和主机版本进行了密集的内部试玩测试，并发现了一些需要额外开发时间才能提供更出色首发体验的方面，」两家公司在联合声明中解释道。

paragraphs.en: “Therefore, after careful consideration, we have decided to delay launch to August 13th. This will ensure that Hell Let Loose: Vietnam launches at the quality level we expect and you deserve.”
paragraphs.cn: 「因此，经过慎重考虑，我们决定将发售推迟至8月13日。这将确保《地狱已满：越南》以我们期望且你们应得的品质水准面世。」

paragraphs.en: For those of you who may be unacquainted with Hell Let Loose: Vietnam, you can check out our thoughts on this hardcore Vietnam War milsim in our recent hands-on preview.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你对《地狱已满：越南》还不太了解，可以看看我们近期上手前瞻中对这款硬核越战军事模拟游戏的评价。

paragraphs.en: Luke is a Senior Editor on the IGN reviews team. You can track him down on Bluesky @mrlukereilly to ask him things about stuff.
paragraphs.cn: Luke是IGN评测团队的高级编辑。你可以在Bluesky上通过@mrlukereilly找到他，向他询问各种事情。
